reviews.comment:
Buena atención, en el área de comida. Es el menú de la full, más algún otro menú económico que está bueno.
La ubicación de la estación se presta para que siempre esté llena y cueste poder estacionar.
La atención para el automóvil es buena.
Falta por ahí que los empleados vayan organizando a los clientes para que estacionen a la hora de comprar y no se molesten o choquen entre sí.

(Translated by Google)
Good service in the food area. It's the full menu, plus a couple of other good budget options.
The station's location means it's always crowded and parking is difficult. The service for cars is good. However, the staff could better organize customers so they park when they're shopping and don't get in each other's way or bump into each other.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMkk2RlR3EAE

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom is amazing!!!! The cleanest I've ever seen at a service station in Argentina!!! It even has air conditioning!! 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻
